title: taraxacum longicarpum
intro: Taraxacum longicarpum, also known as the long-seeded dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant's leaves, roots, and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to provide various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving liver function. Taraxacum longicarpum is often used in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in capsule or tablet form, to leverage its medicinal properties.
